summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: ALERTS, EDITABLE SETTINGS, and TROUBLESHOOTING. All 15 features verified successfully. Backend API tests (13/13 passed), Frontend UI tests verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Crypto tab shows all 24 engines under ONLINE — STEADY group (no warming up for crypto)
Exchanges tab shows 'All markets closed' since it's the weekend (closed markets hidden)
Expanding an engine row shows 5 columns: Why?, Performance, Regime, Settings, Promotion
WHY? column shows gate rows with current/needed values (R-Fit, Conf, Tier) in red/green
WHY? column shows 'Last Signal' and 'Last Trade' info
SETTINGS column shows SL%, TS%, Sig Prob as clickable editable values
SETTINGS column has PAUSE and RESET buttons
Clicking a setting value opens an inline edit input
Entering a value and pressing Enter saves it (fires POST /api/engines/{id}/nudge)
PAUSE button fires nudge API with pause:true
ALERTS counter in department summary bar shows count of engines with issues
Red pulsing dot appears next to engines with alerts (NO TREND status visible on MATIC)
WebSocket data includes gates, last_signal_info, last_trade_ts, alerts fields
seed_data_creation: None - system uses live WebSocket data from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Key implementation details: (1) MarketsView.jsx has 5-column expandable dropdown (Why?, Performance, Regime, Settings, Promotion), (2) EditableParam component handles inline editing with OK button, (3) DeptSummary shows ALERTS counter when alertCount > 0, (4) Backend base_engine.py has _get_gates() method returning gate thresholds vs current values, (5) last_signal_info and last_trade_ts tracked in engine state, (6) Nudge API at POST /api/engines/{id}/nudge accepts stop_loss_pct, trailing_stop_pct, signal_prob, pause, resume params, (7) Reset API at POST /api/engines/{id}/reset resets engine state.

alerts.description: ALERTS counter in dept summary bar, red pulsing dot on engines with issues (stopped/error, 5+ consecutive losses, health < 30)

editable_settings.description: SL%, TS%, Sig Prob clickable to edit, inline input with OK button, fires POST /api/engines/{id}/nudge

troubleshooting.description: WHY? column shows gate values (R-Fit, Conf, Tier) as current vs needed in red/green, Last Signal info, Last Trade timestamp

pause_resume.description: PAUSE button fires nudge with pause:true, changes to RESUME button when paused

crypto_always_online.description: Crypto engines (type='coin') shown under ONLINE — STEADY, never in WARMING UP group

closed_markets_hidden.description: Exchange markets show 'All markets closed' on weekends, no engine rows displayed

websocket_data.description: WebSocket includes gates, last_signal_info, last_trade_ts, alerts fields in engine summary

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/engines/summary: Returns all engine summaries with gates, last_signal_info, last_trade_ts, alerts
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/engines/{id}/nudge: Updates stop_loss_pct, trailing_stop_pct, signal_prob, pause, resume
